value.found_quote:
## Supported Events

| Event | Description | Matcher Target |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `PreToolUse` | Fires before a tool is executed. | Tool name (e.g., `run_command`) |
value.rationale: The page, part of Google's Antigravity 2.0 documentation on Hooks, contains a dedicated "Supported Events" section listing events (PreToolUse, PostToolUse, PreInvocation, PostInvocation, Stop). This directly substantiates the claim. The page describes the feature as currently available without indicating any deprecation or sunset.
